name: Macadamia Nut Lace Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, stir until the sugar dissolves. Bring the butter, sugar, and syrup to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and set aside. Stir together the flour and macadamias in a small bowl.
3. Add the mixture into the saucepan with the reserved ingredients.
4. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls, 4 inches apart, onto well-greased and floured cookie sheets.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes until golden brown.
6. Let cool for 1 minute, then carefully remove the cookies to wire racks using a wide metal spatula.
7. If the cookies harden before removal from the sheet, reheat them in the oven for 2 or 3 minutes to soften.
8. Allow cookies to cool completely.
9. If any pan coating adheres to the cookies, use a pastry brush to remove it.
10. Store in tightly covered containers.
